scripts.build: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/job-store build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run -w @torrify/client-sdk build && npm run -w @torrify/api build && npm run -w @torrify/worker build && npm run -w @torrify/web build
scripts.dev: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/job-store build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run -w @torrify/api dev
scripts.dev:worker: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/job-store build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run -w @torrify/worker dev
scripts.dev:all: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/job-store build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && concurrently -k -n api,worker,web -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run -w @torrify/api dev" "npm run -w @torrify/worker dev" "npm run -w @torrify/web dev"
